76440.subject: Jito's JTX rerating
76440.body:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/eaa70932-7ce4-467e-b338-a662ed575d6a/0xR_NL_Banner_Heading_Wordmark.jpg?t=1776775276)
Caption: 

———————————————————————————

Happy Friday, folks! Today, we dig into how we value JTO following JTX’s July 14 launch. The product is reshaping Jito’s business, turning it from a price taker on Solana blockspace into a price setter on user flow, with our base case implying 57% upside and our blended target implying 267%. Meanwhile, crypto sold off across the board, with Crypto Miners the lone green sector on a wave of AI data center deals.

———————————————————————————

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/42e942ec-f31d-4957-8722-a3ac7b121e1e/0xR_NL_Market_Update.png?t=1767631151) [Market Update]
Caption: 

Yesterday saw broad weakness across crypto, with Crypto Miners standing out as the only sector to finish in positive territory, gaining 1.4%. Modular (-3.7%) led the declines, followed by DePIN (-3.1%), the 2025 Crypto Equity Cohort (-3.0%), and AI (-3.0%). BTC held up relatively well, falling -1.5%, broadly in line with the S&P 500 (-1.1%) and Nasdaq 100 (-1.7%). Risk sentiment was weak across all markets. The Nasdaq Composite fell more than -2%, oil prices moved higher, and the Magnificent Seven sold off ahead of next week's Fed meeting.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/bd4fc42d-b7c5-4cba-91a4-2a8d1f297e9e/image.png?t=1784863432)
Caption: 

Looking beyond the daily move, one trend continues to stand out. Crypto Miners have rallied 27.0% over the past week, outperforming every other crypto sector by a wide margin. The next strongest performers were DEXs (+4.6%), the Bittensor Ecosystem (+4.3%), and the Ethereum Ecosystem (+3.9%). In comparison, the broader equity market was little changed over the same period.

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/715951a7-add1-49e8-9056-302d1db91a67/image.png?t=1784863432)
Caption: 

The rally has been driven by a string of AI infrastructure announcements that are reshaping how investors value Bitcoin miners. On July 20, Hut 8 [announced](https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/hut-8-fully-commercializes-1-103000012.html) a second 15-year, $9.8B lease for 352 MW at its Beacon Point campus. The agreement doubled contracted capacity to 704 MW and increased total base contract value to $19.6B. On the same day, IREN [secured](https://finance.yahoo.com/technology/ai/articles/iren-signs-2-8b-ai-010000618.html) another $2.8B of AI cloud contracts. This lifted its year-end run-rate target from $3.7B to more than $4B, with roughly 85% of capacity now contracted to customers including Microsoft, Nvid

76439.subject: THE MENT TECH INTELLIGENCE BRIEF
76439.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech Labs


Автор: Ment Tech Labs

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ment-tech-intelligence-brief-menttechlabs-23cwf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B9nQnxM5YTxOW2VwXrgrggg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2hpSCcQRh0Xck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mryxrkqj~qi-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mryxrkqj-qi
  
This week, Anthropic committed $40 million to reshape who writes America's AI laws. Apple turned its hardware business into a monthly subscription backed by Klarna. AMD landed Anthropic as a marquee AI customer and began chipping at Nvidia's grip on training silicon. The Blockchain AI market crossed a valuation threshold that was not projected until 2028. And the AI regulatory war between frontier labs spilled from Washington lobbying offices directly into congressional races across the country. Five developments. Each one changes how the next phase of AI and blockchain infrastructure gets built. Here is what every founder, enterprise operator, and investor building in this space needs to understand. ◆ DEVELOPMENT 01 Anthropic Just Committed $40 Million To Reshape Who Writes America's AI Laws. The Largest Political Spend By A Frontier AI Lab In History. And It Is Pointed Directly At Congress. What happened: Anthropic has increased its planned US midterm election spending to $40 million, placing the AI startup near the center of a growing political fight over how Washington should regulate advanced models. The company added another $20 million to Public First Action, a political group supporting candidates who favor stronger AI oversight, transparency requirements, and government scrutiny of frontier systems. The spending puts Anthropic against industry groups seeking lighter rules, including Leading the Future, which has received backing from figures associated with OpenAI and Andreessen Horowitz. Leading the Future sits at $125 million with $31 million earmarked for specific races. New York's 12th Congressional District has emerged as an early battleground, with the two factions backing opposing candidates on AI regulation stance. Why it changes the build environment: The 2026 midterms are now the first federal election cycle where frontier AI companies are treating regulatory outcomes as worth nine-figure bets, with specific House primaries as direct targets. Every AI governance framework, every enterprise compliance requirement, and every data sovereignty standard that gets written in 2027 will reflect the composition of the Congress elected in November 2026. Anthropic and OpenAI are not lobbying the same legislature. They are trying to elect different ones. The Ment Tech perspective: We design AI infrastructure for enterprises oper

76437.subject: 🕵️ Robinhood CEO gets hacked, shills memecoin
76437.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $65,008 (-0.6%) | **ETH** $1,882 (-2.0%) | **SOL** $75 (-3.2%)

* Brent crude tops [$100](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2080280349611802871), up 42% in 20 days, as US [strikes Iran](https://x.com/BRICSinfo/status/2080431768893628897?s=20) for 13th consecutive night — US House passes [resolution](https://x.com/Cointelegraph/status/2080344887237521641) urging Trump to end the Iran war

* Stocks lose [$820B](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2080308821059097052) in market cap as tech earnings disappoint — Tesla sinks [14%](https://x.com/DecryptMedia/status/2080366819114676369) on earnings miss and $25B capex plan — Intel jumps 11% as AI lifts Q2 revenue to [$16.1B](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2080385858385924305)

* Robinhood confirms CEO Vlad Tenev's X account [gets hacked](https://x.com/RobinhoodComms/status/2080353603160584640) to shill a fake 'Vladhood' token

* Strategy changes how they [calculate mNAV](https://x.com/Strategy/status/2080383038395990438?s=20) — Launches [Bitcoin Security Consortium](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2080263847181746619?s=20) with initial focus on quantum defense

* SpaceX hits new post-IPO [low](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2080302745723060588?s=20)

* US jobless claims drop to [187K](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2080275299250626813), a near 60-year low

* Kazakhstan approves '[Strategic Digital Mining](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2080339258196496532)' rules to expand the country's [state crypto reserve](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2080339258196496532)

* AFX Trade's Arbitrum perp DEX gets drained of [$24.15M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2080084093992415266) as the hacker is offered a [30%](https://decrypt.co/374133/arbitrum-perp-dex-afx-trade-drained-of-24m-offers-hacker-30-to-return-it) bounty to return it

* Google discloses a [$94B](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2080280112222601565) stake in SpaceX

* OpenAI rolls out [“Health” feature](https://x.com/gdb/status/2080351159638704615?s=20) to Chat GPT users

* [Grok 4.5](https://x.com/grok/status/2080321013565579709) launches

* Kaito locks in a [data agreement](https://x.com/KaitoAI/status/2080261656421212505) with X to power a wave of new use cases

* Phan

76435.subject: Підкрутив ціни до літа 👨‍🔧
76435.body:
Гаряча знижка всередині‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ​Ну от, тепер можна запускати літній розпродаж!!​​Привіт-привіт!​Сіґгіс на зв’язку. Поки всі відпочивають, я наглядаю за офісом carVertical і дбаю про те, щоб усе працювало як слід.​Маркетологи у відпустці, тож відповідальність за важливі рішення лягла на мене. Саме тому я додав 30 % знижки на звіти про історію автомобіля.​Кажуть, щедрість — моя слабкість. Саме тому я не зміг спокійно дивитися на ці скромні цифри й трохи їх підкрутив. У понеділок маркетологи повернуться й усе знову буде за їхніми правилами. Але поки цього не сталося, користуйся нагодою!​Ну що, готовий до знижки? Тоді тисни сюди:​[Знижка 30 % від Сіґгіса](https://www.carvertical.com/uk/pricing?voucher=summer2026)​Усе полагодив. Можеш не дякувати.

​

Сіґгіс
Охоронець офісного порядку в carVertical

​

​Більше не бажаєш отримувати розсилку? [Відписатися](https://manage.kmail-lists.com/subscriptions/unsubscribe?a=XjH2sS&c=01JKZJ7BT88Y9PEZRCTNJH2RPY&k=bed91e1ebf7eb74f0ab695336d6b95cd&se=novosadovoleg%40gmail.com&m=01KY7A9623Z58VNRNPX33NG9MQ&r=01KY9ZTH8P967YBHFJXDA8FCSQ)CV Group, UAB Aukštaičių g. 7 Вільнюс, Литва  CS_ID:uk

BlackRock, Coinbase and Strategy Just Backed Bitcoin Security
Research

Nine firms including BlackRock, Coinbase, Strategy, ARK
Invest, and Fidelity launched the Bitcoin Security Consortium on
July 23, committing $15 million over three years to fund research
against future quantum computing threats.

Each firm distributes its own share independently. The
consortium has pledged to stay neutral on Bitcoin's code and not
act as a spokesperson for its developers.
